description_long: This is a small, vintage-style single-propeller airplane with a compact fuselage and a straight, mid-mounted wing configuration. The wings and tail surfaces are adorned with roundel insignias, reminiscent of early 20th-century military aircraft, and the tail features a tricolor stripe. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the engine, with a simple windshield and visible seat. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tailwheel, all fixed and non-retractable. The propeller is wooden and mounted at the nose, while the overall color scheme is primarily light blue and white with subtle gray and red accents.
description: A small, vintage single-propeller airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, open cockpit, and fixed landing gear, featuring roundel insignias and a light blue-white color scheme.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full fuselage, open cockpit, fixed landing gear, and the roundel insignia on the wing and tail.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the straight wingspan, roundel insignias on both wings and tail, and the narrow fuselage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cockpit, propeller, and tail details, with the landing gear and wing insignia visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the wooden propeller, open cockpit, and the symmetrical wing layout with visible landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible dihedral or winglets, featuring roundel insignias.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, featuring a tricolor rudder.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two fixed main wheels and a small fixed tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit with a small windshield, located just behind the engine.
